---
title: "Childhood exposure to non-persistent endocrine disruptors, glucocorticosteroids, and attentional function: A cross-sectional study based on the parametric g-formula"
date: 2025-01-01
author:
  - name: Lorenzo Fabbri
    orcid: 0000-0003-3031-322X
    affiliation: ISGlobal, Universitat Pompeu Fabra
categories:
  - Causal Inference
  - Environmental Epidemiology
  - Endocrine Disruptors
  - Neurodevelopment
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Fabbri L</strong>, Robinson O, Basaga&ntilde;a X, Chatzi L, Gra&#382;ulevi&#269;ien&#279; R, Guxens M, Kadawathagedara M, Sakhi AK, Maitre L, McEachan R, et al. "Childhood exposure to non-persistent endocrine disruptors, glucocorticosteroids, and attentional function: A cross-sectional study based on the parametric g-formula." <em>Environmental Research</em> 264 (2025): 120413, doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envres.2024.120413"><code>10.1016/j.envres.2024.120413</code></a>
  links:
    - name: Final version
      url: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envres.2024.120413
      icon: fa-solid fa-scroll
    - name: Code
      url: https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri/paper-helixSC-neuro
      icon: fa-brands fa-github
    - name: Add to Zotero
      url: https://www.zotero.org/save?type=doi&q=10.1016/j.envres.2024.120413
      icon: ai ai-zotero
doi: 10.1016/j.envres.2024.120413
---

## Abstract

Available at the [journal website](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envres.2024.120413).

## Important links

- [Published version](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envres.2024.120413)
- [Code repository](https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri/paper-helixSC-neuro)

## BibTeX citation

```bibtex
@article{fabbri2025childhood,
  title={Childhood exposure to non-persistent endocrine disruptors, glucocorticosteroids, and attentional function: A cross-sectional study based on the parametric g-formula},
  author={Fabbri, Lorenzo and Robinson, Oliver and Basaga{\~n}a, Xavier and Chatzi, Leda and Gra{\v{z}}ulevi{\v{c}}ien{\.{e}}, Regina and Guxens, M{\`o}nica and Kadawathagedara, Manik and Sakhi, Amrit Kaur and Maitre, L{\'e}a and McEachan, Rosemary and others},
  journal={Environmental Research},
  volume={264},
  pages={120413},
  year={2025},
  publisher={Elsevier BV}
}
```
